releaseNotes: Fixes a crash when moving around the buttons / switching seasons on a series page, the channel/episode list scrolling inside the player, and locking a folder or title now keeps your place so you can lock several in a row. Removes the Buffer button from the movie/series player (Live TV only), shows watched checkmarks/timestamps in the in-player Episodes list, and double-press OK to play/pause movies & series. Update from Settings -> Check for Updates.
